pages.storyText: Finn was a brave lion cub with a golden mane and a bright green scarf, but he had one big weakness: sugary snacks. One afternoon, instead of eating his crunchy salad, he went searching for the legendary 'Infinite Candy Jar' hidden in his attic.
pages.imagePrompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink children's book illustration of a cute lion cub named Finn with a golden mane and a bright green scarf. He is in a cozy, sunlit wooden attic, looking excitedly at an old, dusty glass jar filled with colorful candies. Soft hand-drawn textures, gentle sunlight, vibrant but warm colors.

pages.storyText: Suddenly, a tiny blue bird named Skye, wearing a small gold crown, fluttered down. 'Stop!' Skye chirped. 'That jar is a portal to the Sticky Kingdom. If you go there, you might never want to leave, but you will lose your roar!' Finn didn't listen and touched the jar.
pages.imagePrompt: Classic hand-drawn storybook illustration. Finn the lion cub reaches for a glowing glass jar while Skye, a small vibrant blue bird with a tiny gold crown, hovers near his face with a worried expression. Artistic ink outlines, dusty attic background with soft watercolor washes.

pages.storyText: In a flash, Finn was transported to a land where the ground was made of chocolate and the clouds were cotton candy. Everything looked delicious! Finn started eating everything in sight, from gummy bushes to soda fountains, while Skye watched sadly from a lollipop tree.
pages.imagePrompt: A whimsical, colorful book illustration of a candy landscape. The ground is chocolate-brown and trees are giant pink lollipops. Finn the lion cub is happily eating green gummy bear bushes. Skye the blue bird sits on a candy branch. Saturated watercolor style with charming, storybook details.

pages.storyText: After an hour of snacking, Finn felt strange. His golden fur was turning a dull, sticky gray, and his legs felt heavy like lead. When he tried to roar, only a tiny 'squeak' came out. He felt tired, grumpy, and his tummy began to ache terribly.
pages.imagePrompt: Soft, emotive watercolor illustration. Finn the lion cub looks sluggish and tired, his fur now a matted, dull gray with candy bits stuck to it. He sits on a chocolate rock, clutching his stomach. The candy forest looks muted and dim in the background. Gentle, expressive linework.

pages.storyText: The Sugar King appeared, a giant marshmallow man with a frosting cape. 'Welcome!' he boomed. 'Stay here forever and eat only sugar!' But as the King stepped closer, a piece of his frosting fell off, revealing a sad, wilted celery stick hidden underneath. The King was a prisoner of his own snacks!
pages.imagePrompt: Children's book illustration of a giant, round marshmallow man with a purple frosting cape. A small patch of frosting is peeling to reveal a green celery stick inside. The sky is filled with purple watercolor clouds. Imaginative, whimsical art style with soft ink details.

pages.storyText: Skye the bird pointed to a distant, glowing hill. 'The only cure is the Golden Apple of Energy!' Skye cried. Finn tried to run, but he was too slow from all the sugar. He realized he needed to find real strength, not just a sugar rush.
pages.imagePrompt: A wide-angle storybook illustration. A gray, sticky Finn looks toward a distant, bright green hill with a glowing golden tree. Skye the blue bird is pointing the way. The foreground is a sticky caramel swamp. Beautiful watercolor gradients and high-contrast lighting.

pages.storyText: Finn found a small patch of real spinach growing by a stream of fresh water. He took a brave bite. Slowly, the gray faded from his fur, and his golden glow returned. He felt a spark of real energy and sprinted toward the glowing hill, leaving the candy world behind.
pages.imagePrompt: Hopeful and bright watercolor illustration. Finn the lion cub eating bright green spinach by a sparkling blue stream. His fur is transforming back into shiny gold. He looks determined and energetic. The art is airy and light with delicate brushstrokes.

pages.storyText: At the top of the hill, Finn shared the Golden Apple with the Sugar King. As they ate, the Marshmallow Man transformed back into a strong, healthy Broccoli Knight! The sticky kingdom melted away, turning into a beautiful garden of fruits and vegetables.
pages.imagePrompt: Magical storybook illustration of Finn and a tall, heroic Broccoli Knight standing on a lush green hill. They are sharing a glowing golden apple. The candy world is dissolving into a beautiful orchard of fruit trees. Soft, magical watercolor effects and vibrant greens.

pages.storyText: Finn woke up in his attic, the dusty jar now empty. He ran downstairs and headed straight for his bowl of carrots. He took a big, crunchy bite and let out a mighty roar that shook the whole house. He felt stronger and happier than ever before.
pages.imagePrompt: Cheerful, sunny watercolor illustration. Finn the lion cub is in his bright kitchen, happily crunching on an orange carrot. He has a big smile and looks healthy. Skye the blue bird is perched on the window sill. Warm, cozy, and comforting hand-drawn art style.
